case_title: DIANE COLLINS VS. MAUREEN WONG CHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,141.67 FILED BY COLLINS, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG CHEN, MAUREEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED SEP-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG CHEN, MAUREEN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY COLLINS, DIANE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2025BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DIANE COLLINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAUREEN WONG CHEN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS, DIANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG CHEN, MAUREEN DEFENDANT CHEN IS BARRED FROM REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO USE HER PAYMENT PORTAL ABSENT A WRITTEN AGREEMENT WITH PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CHEN IS HEREBY ORDERED TO DROP ALL CLAIMS OF LATE PAYMENT AND INTEREST BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S NON-USE OF THE PORTAL TO MAKE HER RENT PAYMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
